cues.label: A node's contents
cues.headline: Child map + end-of-word flag
cues.narration: Each node maps a character to a child and carries a boolean marking that a word ends here.

cues.label: Insert car
cues.headline: Create c, a, r; flag the end
cues.narration: Insert walks the characters, creating any that are missing, and sets the end-of-word flag on the final node.

cues.label: Insert card
cues.headline: Reuse c-a-r, add only d
cues.narration: card shares the whole car path, so only the d node is new — the common prefix is stored once.

cues.label: search(car) is true
cues.headline: Path exists AND flag set
cues.narration: search walks c-a-r; the node exists and its end-of-word flag is set, so it returns true.

cues.label: search(ca) is false
cues.headline: Prefix node, flag off
cues.narration: search walks c-a; the node exists but its flag is off, because ca was never stored, so it returns false.

cues.label: startsWith(ca) is true
cues.headline: Consume prefix, ignore flag
cues.narration: startsWith walks c-a, consumes the whole prefix, and returns true without ever checking the flag.
